attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
COALESCE(NEMT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)                      AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
COALESCE(NEMT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,'UNKNOWN')      AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT     AS   END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
COALESCE(NEMT.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')              AS   ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)            AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEMT.HQ_REMOTE_CD,'UNKNOWN')							 AS	  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
COALESCE(NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')				 AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
COALESCE(NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
NEMT.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME			 AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEMT.OWNED_FLG,'=')								 AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)			 AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
NEMT.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT			 AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
COALESCE(NEMT.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,-999)			 AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEMT.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')						 AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
COALESCE(NEMT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')					 AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD         
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON NOBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND NOBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
INNER JOIN ($$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT
ON NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY and NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
AND NEMT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEMT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
)
ON NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
AND NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   =NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ','SLS_ADJ') 
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
COALESCE(NESL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
COALESCE(NESL.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,'UNKNOWN')    AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  
NESL.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT    AS  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(NESL.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')     AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,    
COALESCE(NESL.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)   AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NESL.HQ_REMOTE_CD,'UNKNOWN')                    AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')       AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,    
COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,        
NESL.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME    AS    NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
COALESCE(NESL.OWNED_FLG,'=')                       AS    OWNED_FLG,                 
COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)   AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT   AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NESL.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,-999)   AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NESL.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')   AS       VALIDATION_MODE_CD,     
COALESCE(NESL.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS      VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    ,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD  
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV NESL
ON NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NESL.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NESL.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR')
AND NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY >0 
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NEMT1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
COALESCE(NEPT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
COALESCE(NEPT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEPT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
COALESCE(NEPT.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')   AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE(NEPT.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)  AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NEPT.HQ_REMOTE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                  
COALESCE(NEPT.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')    AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEPT.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
NEPT.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME   AS  NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
COALESCE(NEPT.OWNED_FLG,'=')       AS   OWNED_FLG,                
COALESCE(NEPT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NEPT.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT    AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NEPT.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEPT.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')       AS  VALIDATION_MODE_CD,       
COALESCE(NEPT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')    AS  VALIDATION_STATUS_CD         ,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD   
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV NEPT
ON NOBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NEPT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEPT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS'
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NEMT1.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
COALESCE(NEAR.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)                       AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
COALESCE(NEAR.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEAR.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
COALESCE(NEAR.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')   AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE(NEAR.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)  AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NEAR.HQ_REMOTE_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                  
COALESCE(NEAR.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')    AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEAR.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
NEAR.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME   AS  NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
COALESCE(NEAR.OWNED_FLG,'=')       AS   OWNED_FLG,                
COALESCE(NEAR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS  SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NEAR.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT    AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NEAR.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEAR.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')       AS  VALIDATION_MODE_CD,       
COALESCE(NEAR.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')    AS  VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD   
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV NEAR
ON NOBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEAR.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
AND NEAR.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEAR.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'     
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='AR'
AND NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NEMT1.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 COALESCE(NESL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)  AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
COALESCE(NESL.ASGNMT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD, 'UNKNOWN')     AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,  
 NESL.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  AS  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(NESL.ENRCHMT_CUST_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')    AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,    
 COALESCE(NESL.FLD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PTY_KEY,-999)   AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NESL.HQ_REMOTE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')      AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME, 
COALESCE(NESL.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,        
 NESL.NOVALID_SLSACCTGRP_PTYRSN_NAME   AS    NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
COALESCE(NESL.OWNED_FLG, '=')  AS    OWNED_FLG,                 
COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)   AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
NESL.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTN_ID_INT   AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT
,COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PTY_KEY ,-999)   AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NESL.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')   AS       VALIDATION_MODE_CD,     
 COALESCE(NESL.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')  AS      VALIDATION_STATUS_CD    ,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD   
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV NESL
ON NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND NESL.ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NESL.END_TV_DT ='3500-01-01'
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')
AND NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY >0
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NEMT1.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
COALESCE(NEMT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,-999)                      AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,         
COALESCE(NEMT.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,'UNKNOWN')      AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT     AS   END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
COALESCE(NEMT.ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,'MANUAL')              AS   ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,-999)            AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEMT.HQ_REMOTE_CD,'UNKNOWN')							 AS	  HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
COALESCE(NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')				 AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
COALESCE(NEMT.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
NEMT.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME			 AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
COALESCE(NEMT.OWNED_FLG,'=')								 AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)			 AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
NEMT.SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT			 AS   SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
COALESCE(NEMT.SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,-999)			 AS   SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
COALESCE(NEMT.VALIDATION_MODE_CD,'UNKNOWN')						 AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
COALESCE(NEMT.VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,'UNKNOWN')					 AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
CAST('NAMED_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD         
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT
ON NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NOBM.MANUAL_TRX_KEY and NOBM.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
AND NEMT.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NEMT.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('O_ADJ','M_ADJ') 
AND NOBM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT1
WHERE COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY)
